text.message: Coord 8s seems rough to let him have.  Center of board is bad too
doubt red is going to trade it
Are you plowing me with rb?
pls dont give road to red
As much as I like being talked up, you are clearly in the strongest position
But you convinced blue to embargo me, so good job I guess
i have a knight just place it
blue take road just in case
If you do this I won't plow black
I'm actually genuinely sorry about that
you were saying sth different before
threating the plow even though i dont have wheat
I didn't mean for your game to end.  My bad
